title: Itajaí, SC — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Itajaí is a city in SC with a population of 228,858. Santa Catarina’s largest port and a booming logistics hub, known for its fishing tradition, Oktoberfest, and high quality of life.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
